attractions.name: Lake Thun
attractions.description: Lake Thun is the largest Swiss lake entirely within one canton, admired for its stunning Alpine scenery, historic castles, and serene cruise experiences
attractions.hours: Cruises operate year-round with a peak summer schedule (May–Oct) offering hourly departures
source_files: France/All Inclusive Guide- Paris, Switzerland and Italy.pdf
France/Paris, Switzerland and Italy.pdf
Switzerland/Paris, Switzerland and Italy.pdf
Italy/Paris, Switzerland and Italy.pdf

attractions.name: Lake Brienz
attractions.description: Lake Brienz is famed for its deep, turquoise-green waters framed by dramatic Alpine vistas—including the iconic Giessbach Falls—and offers nostalgic paddle-steamer cruises like the Lötschberg
attractions.hours: Boats generally run 09:00 – 18:00 in the main season (April–October) with multiple daily departures
source_files: France/All Inclusive Guide- Paris, Switzerland and Italy.pdf
France/Paris, Switzerland and Italy.pdf
Switzerland/Paris, Switzerland and Italy.pdf
